summary: Implements durable artifactRef, router finalize_merge, workflow wiring, and tests; however required run artifacts (repair-log.md) and workflow-safety review artifacts are missing, preventing full acceptance verification.

requirement_checks.requirement: Open PR retains head-branch dashboard links
evidence: tests/github-messages.test.mjs: renderPrBody renders plan_ready dashboard layout asserting head-branch blob links
scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: buildArtifactLinks falls back to provided branch when artifactRef is null

requirement_checks.requirement: Merged PR rewrites artifact links to the base branch
evidence: scripts/route-pr-loop.mjs: routeEvent emits action 'finalize_merge' with finalArtifactRef=baseBranch
.github/workflows/factory-pr-loop.yml: finalize job sets FACTORY_ARTIFACT_REF=$final_artifact_ref and runs scripts/apply-pr-state.mjs
tests/route-pr-loop.test.mjs: unit test 'routeEvent emits finalize_merge for merged pull request events'
tests/apply-pr-state-metadata.test.mjs: applyArtifactRef tests show apply-pr-state supports __UNCHANGED__/__CLEAR__ and trims values
MISSING_ARTIFACT: .factory/runs/126/repair-log.md is not present, so link resolution for this run cannot be verified

requirement_checks.requirement: Durable artifact ref persists across subsequent metadata updates
evidence: scripts/lib/pr-metadata-shape.mjs: defaultPrMetadata includes artifactRef and normalizeArtifactRef
tests/pr-metadata.test.mjs: canonicalizePrMetadata normalizes artifactRef and renderPrBody preserves artifactRef in serialized metadata

requirement_checks.requirement: Factory PR Loop finalizes merged PRs automatically
evidence: tests/route-pr-loop.test.mjs: finalize_merge routed for merged PRs with factory metadata
.github/workflows/factory-pr-loop.yml: workflow is triggered on pull_request: closed and runs the finalize job wiring the artifact ref

requirement_checks.requirement: Extend PR metadata shape with artifactRef and canonicalize it
evidence: scripts/lib/pr-metadata-shape.mjs: adds artifactRef to defaultPrMetadata and canonicalizePrMetadataShape
scripts/lib/pr-metadata.mjs: renderPrBody wires artifactRef into rendered metadata

requirement_checks.requirement: apply-pr-state supports FACTORY_ARTIFACT_REF and applyArtifactRef helper
evidence: scripts/apply-pr-state.mjs: applyArtifactRef implementation and main() uses FACTORY_ARTIFACT_REF to update metadata

requirement_checks.requirement: Update rendering to prefer artifactRef when present
evidence: scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: buildArtifactLinks accepts artifactRef and prefers it over branch
tests/github-messages.test.mjs: 'renderPrBody uses artifactRef override for dashboard links' asserts links use 'main' when artifactRef provided

findings.title: Missing artifact: repair-log.md
findings.details: The acceptance tests require that post-merge dashboard links (including repair-log.md) 'load successfully'. The file .factory/runs/126/repair-log.md does not exist in the run artifacts, so this cannot be verified for run 126.
findings.recommendation: Add `.factory/runs/126/repair-log.md` (can be empty stub) or adjust acceptance tests/spec if this artifact is not required. Re-run verification.

findings.title: Missing workflow-safety review artifact
findings.details: This change modifies `.github/workflows/factory-pr-loop.yml` and other control-plane logic. Per repository policy, a `workflow-safety` review checklist must be completed and recorded (e.g., `.factory/runs/126/review.json` and accompanying `review.md`). I do not see those artifacts for this run.
findings.recommendation: Publish a `workflow-safety` review for this run that completes the checklist at `.factory/review-methods/workflow-safety/factory-review-checklist.md` and store the review JSON at `.factory/runs/126/review.json`. Only then can workflow changes be accepted without findings.

findings.title: Integration / smoke test for end-to-end merge path
findings.details: Unit tests cover router, applyArtifactRef and rendering, but there is no single test that simulates the full route -> workflow outputs -> apply-pr-state -> updatePullRequest sequence.
findings.recommendation: Add an integration-style test or a smoke script (run in a staging repo) exercising the end-to-end merged PR rewrite path and asserting that updatePullRequest is called with updated body pointing to the base branch.

findings.title: Document FACTORY_GITHUB_TOKEN usage
findings.details: The finalize job uses a `FACTORY_GITHUB_TOKEN` secret alongside `GITHUB_TOKEN`. The repo should document the required secret and its least-privilege expectations.
findings.recommendation: Add a short note in CONTRIBUTING.md or the run spec describing the need for `FACTORY_GITHUB_TOKEN` and minimal required permissions.
